description: A 20-year-old, Daniel Jackson, claims to have founded the Free Republic of Verdis on a disputed strip along the Danube River between Croatia and Serbia. Arguing the land is terra nullius, he built an online micronation with citizens and passports. Croatian authorities removed him after a 2023 settlement attempt, leaving him running the project from exile in the United Kingdom.

title: 'Iran war to end soon,' says Trump; warns Tehran not to try 'anything cute'
description: President Trump declared the Iran war is nearing its end, calling it a "short-term excursion." He warned Tehran against "anything cute," stating it would result in the nation's demise. Trump asserted that US and Israeli strikes had significantly degraded Iran's military capabilities, preventing an imminent attack on the region and Israel.

title: 'Not about spin matchups': Gambhir reveals real reason behind Samson’s recall
description: India's head coach Gautam Gambhir revealed Sanju Samson's return aimed to inject more attacking firepower into the top order, not to counter specific bowlers.  The management prioritizes aggressive intent and explosive batting in the powerplay, believing Samson significantly enhances this strategy.  Gambhir emphasized skill over theoretical matchups, fostering a relaxed team environment.

title: Nuggets vs Thunder injury report: Players out, questionable for March 9 game
description: The Denver Nuggets face the top-ranked Oklahoma City Thunder on March 9, 2026, with both teams battling injuries. Denver, missing Peyton Watson and with Jamal Murray questionable, will lean on Nikola Jokic. Oklahoma City, despite key absences like Jalen Williams and Isaiah Hartenstein, boasts a strong home record and is favored to win this crucial Western Conference clash.

title: Did Taylor Swift influence Travis Kelce’s return for his 4th NFL season?
description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have gone through a lot in the last few months after the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player failed to perform well on the field in the last season. This reportedly had a pretty negative impact on the billionaire pop star's emotional state as she even delayed their wedding for his unstable future in the league.

title: Sarah Jane Ramos hires lawyers to challenge Dak Prescott prenup
description: Dak Prescott, the Dallas Cowboys’ star player, had planned his lavish Italy wedding to long term fiancee and mother of his two children, Sarah Jane Ramos, which was all set to be held on 10th April. But just weeks ahead of the wedding, Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos called off their wedding and there are rumors of an alleged prenup.

title: Watch: How Iran is fighting back against U.S. and Israel
description: One week into the escalating war between Iran, the United States, and Israel, Tehran has intensified its response through missile strikes, regional alliances, and strategic pressure across the West Asia. With tensions rising and no immediate ceasefire in sight, the first week of fighting has already reshaped security calculations across the West Asia, raising fears that the conflict could expand into a wider regional war.

title: Fact Check: Joe Burrow–Jessica Alba Dating Rumor Explained
description: Joe Burrow, the Cincinnati Bengals’ star player, was rumored to be in a pretty long term relationship with popular social media influencer and model, Olivia Ponton. But since last night, the popular quarterback has been rumored to be flirting with popular Hollywood actress, Jessica Alba, and it has sparked panic among fans. But it seems that might not be the case.

title: ‘Without money, we will die here too’: Why war hasn't stopped Indian workers heading to Middle East
description: Despite escalating tensions in West Asia, a steady stream of Indian workers are applying for visas to Gulf countries, driven by economic necessity. Many applicants acknowledge the conflict but prioritize financial stability for their families, believing the risks are manageable compared to unemployment at home.  Remittances from abroad remain a crucial lifeline for numerous Indian households.

title: Amazon sends complaint letter to FCC against Elon Musk's Starlink
description: Amazon's Project Kuiper has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's proposal for a million-satellite constellation, citing a lack of essential technical and space safety details. Amazon argues the plan is speculative, would take centuries to deploy, and could monopolize orbital resources, hindering future space endeavors.
